subcodes.first_line: This is a Tablet that no Books of the heavens and earth can equal, for through it faith in God, the All-Powerful, is established [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح لا یعادله کتب السموات و الارض لان به یثبت الایمان بالله المقتدر
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Word of God is its own standard, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @firmness in the Covenant
